name: IRC_CMT_RECIPIENTS
description: This table stores recipient information for the launch.

columns.Name: RECIPIENT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: LAUNCH_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the LAUNCH_TYPE_CODE. For eg. ORA_JOB_ALERTS.

columns.Name: LAUNCH_ID
columns.Comments: Stores LAUNCH_ID. Foreign Key to IRC_CMT_LAUNCHES.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: Stores PERSON_ID of the recipient. Foreign Key to PER_PERSONS.

columns.Name: DELIVERY_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores delivery channel for the message. Stores delivery type as a lookup code.

columns.Name: ADDRESS_ID
columns.Comments: Stores recipient (Email) Address Id of the recipient. Foreign Key to PER_EMAIL_ADDRESS.

columns.Name: ADDRESS
columns.Comments: Stores recipient (Email) Address of the recipient.

columns.Name: PREFERRED_LANGUAGE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores preferred language of the recipient.

columns.Name: TOKEN_ID
columns.Comments: Stores TOKEN_ID. This column is not used.

columns.Name: TOKENS
columns.Comments: Stores tokens for the recipient.

columns.Name: MSG_STATUS_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores status of the message. Stores message status as a lookup code.

columns.Name: MSG_SENT_TS
columns.Comments: Stores message sent time  for this message.

columns.Name: MSG_DELIVERY_TS
columns.Comments: Stores delivery time  for this message.

columns.Name: MSG_OPEN_TS
columns.Comments: Stores open time  for this message.

columns.Name: MSG_BOUNCE_TS
columns.Comments: Stores bounce time for this message.

columns.Name: MSG_UNSENT_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments:
Stores the reason for not sending the message. It holds different types of unsent reasons as lookup codes. 
      - For emails, it uses the lookup type: ORA_IRC_CMT_MSG_UNSENT_TYPE.
      - For SMS, it uses the lookup type: ORA_HCO_SMS_DELIVERY_TYPE.

columns.Name: MSG_BOUNCE_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Stores the type of the bounce. Stores bounce type as a lookup code.It uses the lookup type:  ORA_IRC_CMT_MSG_BOUNCE_TYPE

columns.Name: MSG_BOUNCE_REASON
columns.Comments: Stores the reason for the bounce.

columns.Name: MSG_RETRY_COUNT
columns.Comments: stores current message retry count.

columns.Name: UMS_MSG_ID
columns.Comments: Stores Unified Message Service (UMS) message Id.

columns.Name: ESS_REQUEST_ID
columns.Comments: Stores the ESS Job Request ID of the current recipient row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
